title: TC4 essentia transport suction parity batch
completed: Added original TileTube state and NBT names type/amount/side/open/stype/samount/venting.
Added openSides/facing adapter and direction-gated tube traversal.
Changed suction cadence toward original 2-tick calculation and 5-tick equalization/transfer rhythm.
Restored original jar suction values: 32 normal, 64 labelled, 32 void, 48 labelled void.
Added original TileJarFillable NBT compatibility keys Aspect/AspectFilter/Amount/facing.
Added venting snapshot when competing suction paths conflict.
forge_1_19_2_adapters: Transport still uses the existing BFS network adapter instead of the full original neighbour-by-neighbour IEssentiaTransport recursion.
Filter/restrict/oneway/buffer tube block variants remain for a later exact TileTube subclass pass.
